title: Nexus WorldForkRequest
description: Request body for POST /v1/worlds/fork — platform may derive parent world from URL, child world server-side, and creator from auth; body carries fork point and optional title.

parent_world_id.description: Source world when not implied by route

child_world_id.description: Desired child world id when client supplies it; otherwise server-generated

forked_from_event_id.description: Timeline event that defines the fork point

created_by_creator_id.description: Creator initiating the fork when not injected from auth
